title: Visual Communication Design Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Visual Communication Design Master Program Mission and Vision

Mission

To educate contemporary academics and designers who can meet the communicative needs of life in the world transformed by digitalization and produce functional and aesthetic solutions to their problems, who have a command of new application areas that are exposed with technology, who follow scientific and theoretical depth of the subject, follow current design ideas, trends and fields.

Vision

With the awareness of the exponentially increasing speed in technology and the world life transformed by digitalization, with the awareness of the new duties and responsibilities of the visual communication designer exposed to this transformation, it is our effort to see the need for researching and systematizing the theoretical and applied fields of the subject in academic platform and scientific methods.
